comment.text: This key displays the label "Default Templates" likely in a UI section related to portal settings, specifically within a page for managing default templates. It appears as a heading or title for a section or component that allows users to view or modify default template configurations.

ai_spell_check_issues.description: The Lao translation 'ເຫຼັກແບບມາດຕະຖານ' translates to 'Standard Iron/Steel' instead of 'Default Templates'. 'ເຫຼັກ' (Iron/Steel) is incorrect in this context.
ai_spell_check_issues.suggestion: ແບບຟອມມາດຕະຖານ

ai_spell_check_issues.description: The Latvian translation 'Nodefiltri' means 'Node filters', which is completely unrelated to 'Default Templates'.

The word 'Défautové' is a Gallicism (derived from French 'défaut') and is not the correct Slovak term for 'Default' in a technical/software context. In Slovak, 'Default' should be translated as 'Predvolené'.

The Serbian translation 'Шаблонски податке' means 'Template data' (accusative case), whereas the English 'Default Templates' refers to the templates themselves as a heading/title. Additionally, 'Default' is missing from the translation.
The translation 'Шаблонні значення за замовчуванням' means 'Default template values', whereas the English 'Default Templates' refers to the templates themselves (objects/files), not their values.
